description: Digital forensics investigations often require filtering thousands of files. Autopsy's 'Interesting Files Identifier' allows examiners to define custom rule sets. Create a forensic case named 'Targeted_Triage_2024' (Case Number: INV-TRG-001) in /home/ga/Cases/ using the disk image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Define an Interesting File Set named 'Config_And_Logs' to match files with extensions txt, log, and xml (case-insensitive). Process the data source using the Hash Lookup (MD5) and Interesting Files Identifier ingest modules. Produce a catalog of all flagged files at /home/ga/Reports/flagged_items.tsv using the header: FILENAME\tFULL_PATH\tSIZE_BYTES\tMD5_HASH\tEXTENSION. Finally, write a summary to /home/ga/Reports/triage_summary.txt including the case number, interesting set name, total flagged files, specific counts for txt, log, and xml files, and a brief triage conclusion.
